description: Recto (secondary use): Order issued by David ha-Nasi to Maḥfūẓ and Sālim the parnasim (al-farānisa). They are to disburse (yuṭliq... mimmā taḥta yadihim) a sum of 40 (or 440?) wariq dirhams for the provisioning(?) of the retinue (? ghilmān) of someone titled al-Ajall al-Afḍal.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
